_meta.legacy_note: Timberline HD was rebranded to Timberline HDZ in 2020 with LayerLock Technology and StainGuard Plus algae warranty. HDZ is the current production line — HD is no longer manufactured.

system_warranty.name: GAF Golden Pledge Limited Warranty
system_warranty.requirements: Installed by GAF Master Elite Contractor + at least 3 qualifying GAF accessories
system_warranty.tier_below: System Plus Limited Warranty (50-yr non-prorated) — same accessory requirements, doesn't require Master Elite status

base_includes: Ice & water shield at eaves, valleys, and penetrations (GAF WeatherWatch)
Dumpster rental + magnetic nail sweep cleanup
Manufacturer system warranty (Golden Pledge or System Plus)
10-year contractor workmanship warranty (50-yr if Master Elite + Golden Pledge)
base_excludes: Roof decking replacement — billed separately at $110/sheet (allowance)
Additional tear-off layers (2nd+ comp layer, cedar shake removal)
Specialty siding repair under step flashing
_meta.notes: All-in $700/SQ × roof_area_sq is the customer-facing price. Itemized lines below show what's INCLUDED for transparency — each line unit_price=0 because it's bundled. Real $-amounts in add_ons for situations beyond base scope.

items.description: Tear off existing composition shingles (1 layer) — dump fees included
GAF Tiger Paw Roof Deck Protection — premium synthetic underlayment, full coverage
GAF WeatherWatch Mineral-Surface Leak Barrier — eaves (6 ft up), valleys (3 ft each side), penetrations
Aluminum drip edge, color-matched — eaves and rakes
GAF Pro-Start Eave/Rake Starter Strip Shingles — eaves and rakes
GAF Timberline HDZ laminate shingles with LayerLock Technology — installed. Lifetime warranty, WindProven (no max wind speed), StainGuard Plus. Includes waste.
items.notes: This is the all-in billing line: $700/SQ × total roof area, waste included.

items.description: GAF Seal-A-Ridge Hip & Ridge Shingles — color-matched
GAF Cobra Ridge Vent — continuous along main ridge
New aluminum step flashing at wall-to-roof intersections
Counter flashing — surface-mount or reglet, masonry chimney/parapet
Dumpster rental + magnetic nail sweep cleanup
Contractor workmanship warranty (10-yr, or 50-yr non-prorated with Golden Pledge)

add_ons.description: Sheathing replacement — 1/2" CDX plywood, per 4x8 sheet (32 SF)
add_ons.notes: Allowance — actual qty determined on tear-off.

add_ons.description: Tear off second (or additional) layer of composition shingles
add_ons.notes: Add per layer beyond single layer included.

add_ons.description: Tear off cedar shake / shingle roof
Upgrade hip & ridge to GAF TimberTex — premium thick profile
Upgrade hip & ridge to GAF Z Ridge — top-tier thick laminate
Lead pipe flashing UPGRADE in lieu of neoprene
Chimney flashing kit — 4-side reglet counter + step + apron

add_ons.notes: Code-required per IRC R1003.20 if chimney >30" wide upslope.

warranty_disclosure: To activate the GAF Golden Pledge Limited Warranty, the installing contractor MUST be GAF Master Elite Certified (top 2% of GAF contractors) AND install the qualifying GAF accessories bundled in this price: Tiger Paw, WeatherWatch, Pro-Start, Seal-A-Ridge, and Cobra. If the contractor is not Master Elite but installs the same accessory mix, the System Plus Limited Warranty applies (50-yr non-prorated, transferable once).
